sections.paragraph:
Original: אט

Transliteration: 'aṭ

Phonetic: at

BDB Definition:

  1. gentleness, softness
    1. gently
    2. flowing
    3. softly
    4. enchanter, necromancer (substantive)

Origin: from an unused root perhaps meaning to move softly

TWOT entry: 72b

Part(s) of speech: Adverb
